config.title: Pamiętaj o zadaniach do wykonania
config.script:
dim g_strWhere : g_strWhere = ""
#include "50203" #include "50629" '------- nx support------- #include "50560"
function fopen if not find_page_on_iid(THIS_FILE) is nothing then fopen = false doc_.postcommand("varCmd=CMD_REFRESH vn5040=THIS_FILE") exit function end if
fopen = prepare_content() end function
function frefresh prepare_content() end function
function prepare_content()
page_.ctrl(CTRID_TASK_CONTAINER).removeall
dim strWhere : strWhere = nx_.convert.formatter("((n5zadanie.dDataPrzyp<>%1 and n5zadanie.dDataPrzyp < %2 or (n5zadanie.dDataPrzyp = %2 and n5zadanie.tCzasPrzyp<=%3)) and n5zadanie.pWykonawca=%4)") _ .add(doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(doc_.afc.globals.nulldate())) _ .add(doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(trans_.var(GVAR_SYSDATE))) _ .add(cstr(trans_.var(GVAR_SYSTIME))) _ .add(getCurrentWykonawcaID()) _ .done()
#ifdef _RAND strWhere = strWhere + " and n5zadanie.nStatus <> N5ZADANIE_ODEBRANE " #endif
g_strWhere=strWhere
dim pM43009 : set pM43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) page_.addxml CTRID_TASK_CONTAINER, _ pM43009.nx_generate_table_result(nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE) _ .raports.get_raport_by_name("@zadania_do_wykonania@"),10,strWhere,1).getstring()
'------------ tak konstrukcja wynika z braku info jak wiele mamy rekordow wynikowych prepare_content = (page_.ctrl(CTRID_TASK_CONTAINER).element(1).body.count > 0) end function
function on_remind_later() page_.goback end function
function on_close() page_.goback() end function
function on_clear_reminders() dim cursor,oZadanie set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,g_strWhere,"","") for each oZadanie in cursor if not oZadanie is nothing then oZadanie.dDataPrzyp = doc_.afc.globals.nulldate() oZadanie.tCzasPrzyp = doc_.afc.globals.nulltime() end if next
trans_.saveobjects end function
